144 P1BBA P1BBA_OCC_THPY_DAY 38bbA(P1bbA)Occupational Therapy Days CHAR 1 Indicates the number of days of occupational therapy received by the patient for the past seven days.
145 P1BBB P1BBB_OCC_THPY_MIN 38bbB(P1bbB)Occupational Therapy Minutes CHAR 4 Indicates the total number of minutes of occupational therapy received by the patient for the past seven days.
